steps.title: Define the goal
steps.content: The student wants to introduce the Slow Food movement to a new audience. A good intro names what the movement is and what it does — its identity and main aims — in one efficient sentence.

steps.title: Pick the most informative single sentence
steps.content:
A only gives founding dates — too thin for an introduction. C mentions only worker advocacy. D states two goals but doesn't name the movement.

B identifies the movement, its founding year, and its core aims (universal access, sustainable production, fair worker treatment) — a complete intro. B is correct.
